title: Urgent Opening Teacher at T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions:
T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions!
